info.title: Arazzo Control Plane (access grant subset)
info.description: The subset of the Arazzo control-plane API the system access-approval workflow calls: the bounded grant operation (design section 16.5.1). The workflow presents the section 13 system credential (source 'controlplane') whose token carries the accessRequests:grant scope. The base URL is supplied by the deployment at run time.

post.description: Writes the capped, time-boxed entitlement the decision authorized. Gated by the narrow accessRequests:grant capability the system credential holds.

post.summary: Grant a pending access request as standing eligibility (system-credentialed)
post.description: Writes the capped eligibility assignment the decision authorized (design section 16.5.3): the requester may thereafter self-elevate this access JIT without re-approval. Gated by the narrow accessRequests:grant capability the system credential holds.

reason.description: An optional grant note, typically the approver's decision note.

status.description: The request status after the grant (Approved).
